mnemonics: B.I.R.D.S. Fly Over Text: (B)ernoulli vs (I)dentical Features, (R)obust to (D)ata Sparsity, (S)entiment & (S)pam
keyPoints: Naive Bayes is highly scalable and efficient for large text datasets.
It performs well on sentiment analysis, spam detection, and topic categorization tasks.
Its 'naive' assumption of feature independence simplifies computation but is often violated in text data.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to apply Laplace (add-one) smoothing, leading to zero probability problems.
Confusing Multinomial NB (word counts) with Bernoulli NB (word presence/absence) for different text tasks.
